name: MineFun.io
author: Poki
description: MineFun.io is an online game that throws you into a vibrant blocky world packed with adventures! Kick things off in parkour mode, where you’ll put your skills to the test by jumping, running, and dodging obstacles on tricky platforms. Pick from a wide range of cool maps, from island getaways to the classic Obby world. Rack up coins to snag awesome skins and personalize your character. Want to play with friends? Join a private room or share your room code to play with friends. Ready to dive into the fun? New Game Rooms in MineFun.io MineFun.io now has three exciting new game rooms for you to try: Bed Wars, Sky Wars, and Parkour. Each room offers a different way to play, whether you like working in a team, battling in the sky, or testing your jumping skills. Bed Wars In Bed Wars, your goal is to protect your bed while trying to destroy the beds of other teams. If your bed is gone, you can't respawn, so build strong defenses and work with your teammates to win the match. Sky Wars Sky Wars takes the battle to floating islands in the sky. Gather blocks, make bridges between islands, and fight opponents while avoiding falling into the void. Parkour Parkour challenges you to jump, run, and climb through tricky obstacle courses, often called Obby maps. Time your jumps perfectly, avoid falling, and reach the finish line as fast as you can. How to play MineFun.io? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Jump: the space bar Crouch: C Who created MineFun.io? MineFun.io is created by Vectaria. Play their other games on Poki: Cryzen.io and Vectaria.io ! How can I play MineFun.io for free? You can play MineFun.io for free on Poki. Can I play MineFun.io on mobile devices and desktop? MineFun.io can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play MineFun.io with my friend? Yes! MineFun.io is a multiplayer game so you can play it with your friends online!
